select_tools_for_prompt: select the most relevant tools for a user prompt using BM25 index and keyword detection
build_mcp_system_context: build a compact MCP context string for the system prompt with the best matching resource
enrich_mcp_tool_description: enrich an MCP tool description with routing info including function name and endpoint
get_coder_tool_index: get the file path to the coder tool uses index from the environment variable
keyword_relevance: score a tool relevance to a user prompt using keyword and alias matching
